email.email_body:
Hi Roberto,

I'm reaching out because of how teams at companies like Asesoria Prospera tend to spend disproportionate time on lead research and qualification before any outreach goes out.

Reading the context we already have on Asesoria Prospera, the picture suggests an opportunity to streamline how the team handles prospecting and qualification.

No outbound motion to support Position LeadForge as a way to improve prioritization and reduce manual research before outreach. At Asesoria Prospera, LeadForge can help prioritize the leads that deserve attention and reduce the manual research that slows outreach down.

Would it be worth a quick look? Happy to share a short example tailored to Asesoria Prospera, or skip it entirely if this isn't a fit.

— LeadForge (draft for review)
